bugReports.summary: Cart issue: Update quantity works from cart workflow
bugReports.description: During automated validation of "Cart - Update quantity works from cart workflow", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.
stepsToReproduce: Execute scenario: Cart - Update quantity works from cart workflow
Observe behavior and compare with expected journey outcome.
bugReports.expectedResult: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.
bugReports.actualResult: Action target "add to cart" is disabled.
bugReports.suggestedFix: Inspect failing module logic and stabilize related frontend/backend dependencies.
bugReports.businessImpact: Feature quality degradation may increase support overhead.
bugReports.userImpact: Some users face interruptions or degraded usability.
bugReports.revenueImpact: Indirect or partial revenue impact is possible depending on traffic mix.
